editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Per-domain RoB 2.0 summary not attached to the included-trials table.
Publication-bias assessment (Egger / trim-and-fill) absent despite k>=10.
Pooled 0.85 diverges from Rosenfeld 2006 benchmark (MD 17.50 [13.00, 22.00]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
Egger regression missing from headline readout despite k>=10.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
